description: As a GEOINT analyst, configure a dual-view workspace in ESA SNAP Desktop to investigate the multispectral image at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (bands: SWIR1, NIR, Red, Green loaded as band_1 to band_4). Create two distinct RGB Image Windows: View 1 (Red=band_1, Green=band_2, Blue=band_3) and View 2 (Red=band_2, Green=band_3, Blue=band_4). Draw a vector Region of Interest (ROI) over an area in one of the views. Export a visual snapshot of the workspace to ~/snap_exports/view_snapshot.png, save the modified product in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_exports/investigation_product.dim, and save the SNAP session to ~/snap_exports/investigation_session.snap.
